message:
test(conformance): optional-reply-sequence harness + CLIENT CACHING goldens

Expands the conformance harness to handle sequences where any command
can suppress its own network reply (the CLIENT REPLY / CLIENT TRACKING
feature from the runtime/server commit) and pins the Redis-7 error
strings for CLIENT CACHING negative paths in the fixture goldens.

crates/fr-conformance/src/lib.rs (+92)
  * New pub `LiveOptionalReplyCase { name, now_ms, argv }` struct so
    a fixture author can describe a case whose oracle reply might be
    "no frame sent" rather than any concrete RespFrame.
  * New pub `run_live_redis_optional_reply_sequence_diff(config,
    suite_name, cases, oracle)`:
      - Runs each case through the live runtime and compares against
        the oracle's wire reply. Either side may legally omit the
        reply frame — the harness falls back to
        `live_oracle_no_reply_sentinel()` for a missing side and
        compares both sides element-wise.
      - Writes structured log evidence under
        `live_redis_optional_reply_diff::{suite}` when a live_log
        root is configured, same format as the other live diff
        runners.
      - Drives `runtime.suppress_current_network_reply()` after
        each execute_frame to decide whether the runtime's side is
        "no wire reply."

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs
  * +73 lines: new smoke cases driving CLIENT REPLY OFF → SKIP → ON
    sequences and CLIENT TRACKING BCAST / OPTIN / OPTOUT combos
    through the new `run_live_redis_optional_reply_sequence_diff`
    against a vendored Redis oracle.

crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_client.json (+149)
  * Update two existing CLIENT CACHING cases that previously
    expected `+OK`:
      - `client_caching_yes_without_tracking` — now expects
        "ERR CLIENT CACHING can be called only when the client
         is in tracking mode with OPTIN or OPTOUT mode enabled"
      - `client_caching_no_without_tracking` — same error.
    These replies are what Redis 7 actually returns; the prior
    `+OK` goldens were a stale guess.
  * Add new cases pinning CLIENT TRACKING / CLIENT GETREDIR /
    CLIENT TRACKINGINFO / CLIENT REPLY goldens against Redis-7
    behavior, exercising each option-combination error string
    registered in fr-command (REDIRECT missing, PREFIX requires
    BCAST, OPTIN/OPTOUT conflict, BCAST+OPT conflict).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

       ],
       "expect": {
-        "kind": "simple",

       }

       }

-      "name": "client_trackinginfo_wrong_arity",
+      "name": "client_tracking_on_optin",
       "now_ms": 271,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "TRACKING",
+        "ON",
+        "OPTIN"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "simple",
+        "value": "OK"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "client_caching_yes_optin_ok",
+      "now_ms": 272,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "CACHING",
+        "YES"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "simple",
+        "value": "OK"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "client_caching_no_optin_rejected",
+      "now_ms": 273,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "CACHING",
+        "NO"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR CLIENT CACHING NO is only valid when tracking is enabled in OPTOUT mode."
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "client_tracking_on_bcast_prefix_noloop",
+      "now_ms": 274,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "TRACKING",
+        "ON",
+        "NOLOOP",
+        "PREFIX",
+        "foo",
+        "BCAST",
+        "PREFIX",
+        "bar"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "simple",
+        "value": "OK"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "client_getredir_returns_zero_when_tracking_enabled",
+      "now_ms": 275,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "GETREDIR"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "integer",
+        "value": 0
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "client_trackinginfo_returns_bcast_prefix_noloop",
+      "now_ms": 276,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "TRACKINGINFO"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          {"kind": "bulk", "value": "flags"},
+          {"kind": "array", "value": [
+            {"kind": "bulk", "value": "on"},
+            {"kind": "bulk", "value": "bcast"},
+            {"kind": "bulk", "value": "noloop"}
+          ]},
+          {"kind": "bulk", "value": "redirect"},
+          {"kind": "integer", "value": 0},
+          {"kind": "bulk", "value": "prefixes"},
+          {"kind": "array", "value": [
+            {"kind": "bulk", "value": "bar"},
+            {"kind": "bulk", "value": "foo"}
+          ]}
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+    {

+        "OPTOUT"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "simple",
+        "value": "OK"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "client_caching_no_optout_ok",
+      "now_ms": 278,
+      "argv": [
+        "CLIENT",
+        "CACHING",
+        "NO"
+      ],
+      "expect": {

+        "value": "OK"
+      }
+    },

+      "now_ms": 279,

+        "CACHING",
+        "YES"
+      ],

+    },

       "argv": [
         "CLIENT",
         "TRACKINGINFO",
